name: blender-remote
description: Control Blender headlessly via Claude Code using the blender-remote MCP. Covers session management, scene/material setup, CAD file import, and Cycles/CUDA rendering.

hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" && if ! claude mcp list 2>/dev/null | grep -q blender; then echo '[blender-remote] MCP not configured — installing dependencies...' && uv sync --quiet && claude mcp add blender -e BLENDER_HOST=localhost -e BLENDER_PORT=6688 -- uvx blender-remote --host localhost --port 6688 && echo '[blender-remote] MCP registered. Start Blender with: blender-start'; fi
